# render-contributions

Contributes a `Contributions.FacetTable` tab to the Studio Contributions view showing all exported symbols aggregated across plugins, with runtime, kind, plugin, and consumer columns.

## Plugin reference

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:BEGIN — do not edit; regenerated by `./singularity build` -->

## Plugin reference

- Description: Aggregated cross-plugin exports table in the Studio Contributions view.
- Web:
  - Contributes: `Contributions.FacetTable` "Exports"
  - Uses: `plugin-meta/contributions-table.Contributions`, `plugin-meta/contributions-table.defineFacetTable`, `plugin-meta/contributions-table.FacetTableEntry`, `plugin-meta/contributions-table.PluginChip`, `primitives/css/badge.Badge`
